description: Template for Fabric MCP server configuration. Copy and customize for your environment.

fabric.description: Microsoft Fabric MCP server for workspace and artifact operations

fabric-warehouse.description: Fabric Warehouse MCP server for SQL operations

fabric-lakehouse.description: Fabric Lakehouse MCP server for Delta table and file operations

_comments.url: Replace with your actual MCP server URLs
_comments.token: Set FABRIC_MCP_TOKEN environment variable or replace with actual token
_comments.transport: Use 'http' for remote servers, 'stdio' for local process-based servers
_comments.capabilities: Adjust based on what your MCP server supports
